parts.text:
Generate a 2D boss enemy sprite for a tower defense game in Unity. The project uses a "Casual Monsters" art style - cute, cartoon-style 2D characters with clean outlines, bright colors, and simple shading. The game is top-down perspective.

The boss should be a powerful, imposing creature that looks like a final boss - something like a giant demon lord or undead king. It should be larger and more intimidating than regular enemies (which include goblins, skeletons, orcs, bats) but still match the casual/cartoon art style.

Use the generate_sprite custom tool to create this sprite. The prompt should be something like:
"A large menacing demon lord boss character, 2D game sprite, casual cartoon style, clean outlines, bright colors, top-down view, facing forward, dark armor with glowing red eyes, cape, imposing horns, transparent background, suitable for tower defense game"

Save the sprite to Assets/Art/Enemies/boss_demon_lord.png
401 team not allowed to access model. This team can only access models=['alias-only-proxy-models']. Tried to access glm-5-fp8

description: Subagent auto-save triggered by terminal status: failed
